description_long: This is a stylized rifle with a blocky, pixelated design reminiscent of digital camouflage, featuring a mix of red, black, gray, and white colors. The rifle has a fixed stock at the rear, a prominent curved magazine, and a long barrel with a front sight post. The receiver and handguard areas are detailed with angular, geometric patterns, and the grip is ergonomically shaped. The magazine is detachable and matches the overall color scheme, while the barrel appears to be of standard length with no visible suppressor or muzzle brake. The rifle's surface finish is matte, and the construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials. This object is visually striking and would stand out in an urban environment due to its unique coloration and digital aesthetic.
description: A blocky, pixel-camouflage rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and long barrel, featuring red, black, gray, and white colors. Its angular, digital design gives it a modern, stylized appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel end, front sight post, and a glimpse of the red and black color pattern.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the rifle, fixed stock, curved magazine, and the digital camouflage pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock and the symmetrical alignment of the rifle's body, with red and black details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile displaying the same features as view 1, with the digital pattern and magazine curvature clearly visible.
